channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Arizona AG Hits Kalshi with Criminal Charges
item.description: The prediction market is accused of misdemeanors related to illegal gambling.

item.title: Apple’s Head Engineer for Home Devices Quits Apple Amid Siri Debacle, Joins Oura
item.description: Apple's smart home devices have not seen a major new release in some time, and reporting strongly suggests that's because of the company's struggles with Siri.

item.title: This simple ChatGPT trick forces the AI to poke holes in its own logic
item.description: A simple follow-up prompt turns ChatGPT from a confident answer machine into a more thoughtful, self-critical assistant

item.title: You can catch Deoxys, Ho-Oh, and Lugia in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen for Switch and Switch 2 — but what about Mew?
item.description: I went searching for Mew in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen, but is it actually obtainable? Here’s what I discovered.

item.title: Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
item.description: In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.
